image.title: Lea Fischer
image.description: Portrait photo for the team member profile.

bio: Lea designed the ten house presets — from Aurora to Citrus — that ship alongside the five shadcn styles. She defined Desiderio's OKLCH token scale so dark mode, density, and radius settings hold up in every theme, and she drove the per-page preset feature in 2.6 that lets each styleguide chapter run its own look. She also reviews every new component for token-only styling before it merges.
